---
title: "Vignettes"
---

These vignettes show how to work with IRW data for common psychometric tasks. Each one uses the [`irw` R package](https://itemresponsewarehouse.github.io/Rpkg/) to fetch data and walks through a complete analysis.

| Vignette | Question answered | Key packages |
|---|---|---|
| [Calculating IMV Values](./imv.qmd) | How much does a 2PL improve on a 1PL for a given dataset? | `irw`, `mirt`, `imv` |
| [Simulating Item Difficulties](./diffsim.qmd) | How can I simulate item difficulties that reflect real-world distributions rather than idealized assumptions? | `irw` |
| [2PL Parameters Across Datasets](./2pl_across_datasets.qmd) | What do discrimination parameters look like across many cognitive/educational datasets in the wild? | `irw`, `mirt`, `ggplot2` |
| [Conducting CFA with IRW Data](./cfa.qmd) | How do I fit a multi-factor CFA model to an IRW personality dataset? | `irw`, `lavaan`, `psych` |
